creator: reg@shale.csir.co.za
text:
Attached are patches to upgrade the PNG port to 1.0.3, and to fix
	the two ghostscript ports which would be broken by this.  PNG 1.0.3
	is apparently completely backwards compatible with 1.0.2.

	Maintainer contacted with no response.

How-To-Repeat: 
	Over and over...
